name: Old Town Walk
shortDescription: Historic streets, viewpoints, and photo spots.
longDescription:
This walking area is ideal for first-time visitors.
You’ll see old streets, famous viewpoints (like the Corniche), and beautiful photo spots.
Plan 1–2 hours and wear comfortable shoes.
address: Place de la Constitution (start), Luxembourg City

name: Mullerthal Trail (Sample)
shortDescription: Scenic hiking area with rock formations.
longDescription:
A popular nature area known as “Little Switzerland”.
You can choose short or long hikes depending on your time and fitness.
Bring water and check the weather before you go.

name: Moselle Riverside
longDescription:
A calm visiting area along the Moselle river.
Good for an easy walk, photos, and relaxing in cafés nearby.
Best in spring and summer when the weather is pleasant.

name: Castle Viewpoint (Sample)
shortDescription: Popular viewpoint near a historic castle area.
longDescription:
A scenic visiting area around Vianden Castle.
Perfect for tourists who want history + views in one trip.
You can combine it with a short walk around the town.

name: National Museum (Sample)
longDescription:
A good choice when the weather is cold or rainy.
You can learn about Luxembourg’s history, archaeology, and art collections.
Plan 1–2 hours depending on interest.

name: Family Park (Sample)
shortDescription: Outdoor area for families and picnics.
longDescription:
A simple outdoor visiting area for families.
Nice for a picnic, light walking, and relaxing in nature.
Bring snacks, water, and sun protection in summer.

name: Wine Route Stops (Sample)
longDescription:
A visiting area idea for exploring small stops along the wine region.
Great for tourists who enjoy scenic routes and local products.
Autumn is especially nice when vineyards are colorful.

name: City Shopping Area (Sample)
longDescription:
A central visiting area for shopping, cafés, and a relaxed city walk.
Good option for all seasons, especially on rainy days.
Combine it with nearby viewpoints and museums.

name: Lake Picnic Spot (Sample)
shortDescription: Picnic and relaxing spot near a lake area.
longDescription:
A summer visiting area for picnics and relaxing near water.
Great for families and tourists who want a peaceful nature moment.
Bring a picnic blanket and keep the area clean.

name: Winter Indoor Activity (Sample)
shortDescription: Example indoor visiting point for cold season.
longDescription:
An indoor visiting area idea for winter days.
Good when it is cold outside and you still want to explore.
Plan 1–2 hours and check opening times before going.
